promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch in folder order after the archived system-spec reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates a sealed persistence base, a larger append-only working-context expansion, explicit thin-canon cautions, and a short migration handoff block that compress cleanly into a bounded contradiction-preserving pass.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Episode 01 was used for copy/full drift and migration-marker interpretation, the low-entropy batch was used for thin-canon caution, and the system-spec batch was used for archived role-boundary alignment.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until this stronger adjacent bridge/context family was reduced into smaller reusable packets.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived working-context parent batch plus the Episode 01, low-entropy, and system-spec A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable bridge-layer, persistence, classification, thin-canon, and migration packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: SEALED_BASE_AND_APPEND_EXPANSION_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the visible copy/full boundary so later archive work can reason about stabilization versus expansion without erasing either side.

candidate_items.name: COLLAPSE_AWARE_SAVE_AND_APPEND_ONLY_WORKING_DOC_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the family's clearest enduring continuity packet without importing the whole archived transport stack.

candidate_items.name: LADDER_STRATA_AND_ARCHIVE_CLASS_INTEGRATION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves one of the safest reusable packets in the append: ladder strata, archive classes, bounded conversation preservation, and quarantine boundaries.

candidate_items.name: WORKING_CONTEXT_TO_WORKBENCH_EXPANSION_CLASSIFICATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest classification of the append as archive-side workbench expansion rather than simple context preservation.

candidate_items.name: THIN_CANON_CAUTION_OVER_FRAMEWORK_ELIMINATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest safeguard against collapsing the family's stronger framework eliminations into thin-canon law.

candidate_items.name: MIGRATION_APPEND_ROLE_TIGHTENING_HANDOFF_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the short migration append as a high-value stale-state handoff block rather than flattening it into timeless doctrine.

quarantined_items.name: FULL_ZIP_RATCHET_WORDING_AS_CURRENT_SAVE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The old durability wording remains archive history and cannot outrank later distinctions between persistence, transport, and canon state.

quarantined_items.name: A1_TRANSLATION_ONLY_AND_A0_BATCHING_ONLY_AS_CURRENT_ACTIVE_ROLE_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The migration append encodes stale-state tightening and visible internal role drift, not settled current law.

quarantined_items.name: L0_L1_ELIMINATIONS_AS_EXPLICIT_THREAD_B_CANON
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly says the referenced Thread-B canon is thin, so stronger eliminations remain archive-side framework reasoning unless separately ratcheted.

quarantined_items.name: WORKING_CONTEXT_AUTHORITY_AS_STANDING_CURRENT_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The family widens into mixed structural and convergence work that outruns simple context preservation, so its authority remains episode-local and archived.

quarantined_items.name: DENSITY_OPERATOR_ATTRACTION_AS_UNIQUE_FORCED_FOUNDATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The family repeatedly preserves non-uniqueness even while revisiting operator and density overlays as attractive candidates.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest bridge-layer packets in the family: copy/full boundary preservation, collapse-aware persistence, archive-class integration, workbench classification, thin-canon caution, and migration handoff.
They preserve the family as archived process history without letting its deeper structural passes or stale-state role tightening self-authorize current law.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain save-doctrine overreads, stale-state role-law projections, canon overclaims, or uniqueness collapses rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used Episode 01, the low-entropy canon-boundary batch, and the system-spec role-boundary batch as nearby archived anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived working-context reduction pass.
